about.metaDescription: Learn about Taara Jyotishyam — Vedic birth charts, horoscopes, and AI readings in six Indian languages.
about.title: About us
about.intro: Taara Jyotishyam (jyotishyam.in) provides Vedic astrology services online — precise Lahiri sidereal birth charts, Moon-sign horoscopes, kundali matching, and AI-assisted personalised readings in English, Hindi, Marathi, Kannada, Telugu, and Tamil.
about.addressMissing: Business address will be published here for payment-gateway verification. Set BUSINESS_AADHAAR_ADDRESS in your deployment environment.
about.missionBody: We make classical Jyotish accessible — accurate calculations, clear language, and transparent pricing — without the upselling common in offline consultations.

services.metaDescription: Free birth charts, daily weekly and monthly horoscopes, kundali matching, and paid AI chart readings.
services.title: Services we provide
services.intro: All calculations use the Lahiri ayanamsa. Paid readings are digital products delivered instantly on the website after payment.

birth-chart.name: Vedic birth chart (Kundali)
birth-chart.description: Full sidereal chart with lagna, nine planets, houses, and nakshatra — calculated from your date, time, and place of birth.

horoscope-forecasts.name: Daily, weekly & monthly horoscopes
horoscope-forecasts.description: Moon-sign (Chandra rashi) forecasts for all twelve rashis, updated on a schedule in six languages.

kundali-match.name: Kundali matching (Ashtakoot)
kundali-match.description: 36-point compatibility report for bride and groom charts, with an optional AI relationship summary.

reading-single.name: Single AI chart reading
reading-single.description: One in-depth reading section — Personality, Career & Dharma, or Current Dasha — based on your saved birth chart.

reading-bundle.name: Complete AI reading bundle
reading-bundle.description: All three reading sections (Personality + Career + Dasha) for one chart at a discounted bundle price.

pricing.metaDescription: Transparent pricing for Taara Jyotishyam — free charts and horoscopes; paid AI readings from ₹100.
pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.intro: Core astrology tools are free. You pay only for optional AI-generated personalised chart readings.
pricing.freeNote: Free services require no payment. Paid readings are one-time purchases per chart.
pricing.checkoutNote: Secure checkout on our website. Payments are processed via authorised payment partners (PayU / Razorpay).

checkout.metaDescription: Complete your purchase for Taara Jyotishyam AI chart readings.
checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.acceptTerms: I agree to the Terms & Conditions, Privacy Policy, Refund Policy, and Cancellation Policy.
checkout.instructions: After payment you will return to the site to generate your reading from your saved birth chart. If you have not entered birth details yet, you will be guided to do so first.
checkout.gatewayNote: You will be redirected to our secure payment partner to complete the transaction.
checkout.invalidSku: Please choose a valid product from the pricing page.

single.name: Single AI chart reading
single.description: One reading section: Personality, Career & Dharma, or Current Dasha.

bundle.name: Complete AI reading bundle
bundle.description: All three reading sections for your chart.

terms.metaDescription: Terms and conditions for using Taara Jyotishyam.
terms.title: Terms & Conditions

sections.heading: 1. Acceptance
sections.body: By accessing jyotishyam.in ("Taara Jyotishyam", "we", "us") you agree to these Terms & Conditions. If you do not agree, please do not use the website.

sections.heading: 2. Services
sections.body: We provide online Vedic astrology tools including birth-chart calculation, horoscopes, kundali matching, and optional AI-generated readings. Services are for personal guidance and entertainment only — not medical, legal, financial, or professional advice.

sections.heading: 3. Accounts and eligibility
sections.body: You must be at least 18 years old to make purchases. You are responsible for the accuracy of birth data you submit. We do not guarantee specific outcomes from any reading.

sections.heading: 4. Payments
sections.body: Paid products are listed on our Pricing and Checkout pages. Prices are in Indian Rupees (INR) and include applicable taxes unless stated otherwise. Payment is collected through authorised payment gateways (e.g. PayU, Razorpay).

sections.heading: 5. Digital delivery
sections.body: AI readings are delivered digitally on the website immediately after successful payment and chart generation. No physical goods are shipped.

sections.heading: 6. Acceptable use
sections.body: You may not misuse the site, attempt to circumvent payment, scrape content at scale, or use the service for unlawful purposes.

sections.heading: 7. Intellectual property
sections.body: Website content, branding, and software are owned by the merchant operating Taara Jyotishyam. You receive a personal, non-transferable licence to view readings you purchase.

sections.heading: 8. Limitation of liability
sections.body: To the fullest extent permitted by law, we are not liable for indirect or consequential damages arising from use of the site or reliance on readings.

sections.heading: 9. Governing law
sections.body: These terms are governed by the laws of India. Disputes shall be subject to the courts of the merchant's registered jurisdiction.

sections.heading: 10. Contact
sections.body: For questions about these terms, email support@jyotishyam.in.

privacy.metaDescription: How Taara Jyotishyam collects and uses your data.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy

sections.heading: 1. Information we collect
sections.body: We collect birth details (date, time, place) that you enter for chart calculation, browser session data for usage limits, and payment metadata from our payment partners when you purchase a reading. We do not store full card or UPI credentials on our servers.

sections.heading: 2. How we use information
sections.body: Birth data is used to calculate charts and generate readings. Payment data is used to confirm your purchase and unlock paid features. We may use aggregated, anonymised analytics to improve the service.

sections.heading: 3. AI processing
sections.body: Personalised readings are generated using third-party AI services. Chart summaries sent for generation contain astrological data derived from your birth details, not your name unless you include it.

sections.heading: 4. Cookies
sections.body: We use cookies and similar storage for language preference, entitlement after payment, and session limits. You can control cookies through your browser settings.

sections.heading: 5. Sharing
sections.body: We share data only with service providers necessary to operate the site (hosting, payments, AI APIs) and when required by law. We do not sell personal data.

sections.heading: 6. Retention
sections.body: Chart and reading data may be stored in your browser session. Server logs are retained for a limited period for security and debugging.

sections.heading: 7. Your rights
sections.body: You may request access or deletion of personal data we hold by contacting support@jyotishyam.in. Indian users may have rights under applicable data-protection laws.

sections.heading: 8. Contact
sections.body: Privacy queries: support@jyotishyam.in.

refund.metaDescription: Refund policy for Taara Jyotishyam paid readings.
refund.title: Refund Policy

sections.heading: 1. Digital products
sections.body: Paid products on Taara Jyotishyam are digital AI-generated readings delivered instantly on the website. Once a reading has been successfully generated and displayed after payment, the order is considered fulfilled.

sections.heading: 2. Eligible refunds
sections.body: We will issue a full refund if: (a) payment was charged but the reading could not be delivered due to a technical failure on our side; (b) you were charged twice for the same product; or (c) required by applicable consumer-protection law.

sections.heading: 3. Non-refundable cases
sections.body: Refunds are generally not provided if you entered incorrect birth details, if you simply changed your mind after receiving the reading, or if you disagree with the interpretive content of an AI reading.

sections.heading: 4. How to request
sections.body: Email support@jyotishyam.in within 7 days of purchase with your payment reference (order/transaction ID), registered email, and a description of the issue. We aim to respond within 3 business days.

sections.heading: 5. Refund method
sections.body: Approved refunds are processed to the original payment method within 7–10 business days, depending on your bank or payment provider.

cancellation.metaDescription: Cancellation policy for Taara Jyotishyam orders.
cancellation.title: Cancellation Policy

sections.heading: 1. One-time purchases
sections.body: All paid offerings on Taara Jyotishyam are one-time digital purchases, not recurring subscriptions. There is no automatic renewal to cancel.

sections.heading: 2. Before payment
sections.body: You may abandon checkout at any time before completing payment with no charge.

sections.heading: 3. After payment
sections.body: Once payment is successful and the digital reading is generated, the order cannot be cancelled because delivery is immediate. See our Refund Policy for exceptional cases.

sections.heading: 4. Failed payments
sections.body: If payment fails or is declined, no order is created and you will not be charged.

sections.heading: 5. Contact
sections.body: Questions about orders: support@jyotishyam.in.
